title: Plans revealed for second Micron business park in Clay: 10 buildings, more than 100 acres
summary: Onondaga County is advancing plans for a second business park in Clay across from the White Pine Commerce Park, where Micron Technology is constructing a major semiconductor factory. The new park will feature 10 buildings on more than 100 acres, representing significant economic development and infrastructure expansion in the region.

political_signal.description: County-level economic development initiative aligned with state/regional semiconductor manufacturing investment strategy; demonstrates regional coordination on major industrial infrastructure
